summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DSA Tracker bulk update functionality and related features. All backend APIs working correctly, bulk update endpoint fixed and functional, frontend integration working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend: All 33 API tests passed (100% success rate)

Frontend: Dashboard loads and displays 242 topics correctly
MARK COMPLETED button successfully updates multiple topics
Sorting functionality working in both backend and frontend
Progress bars updating after bulk operations
